test_family: 3 HCTL TF pairs x 2 scoring methods in discovery cohort
effect_size: Pearson r for raw target-gene mean and AUCell score
p_value_type: two-sided nominal correlation p; BH-FDR reported within the 3-pair family
ci_reporting: Fisher-z 95% CI for Pearson r; Spearman sensitivity in Table S5
interpretation_limit: Tests method stability, not direct TF activity or causality

test_family: available pathway-score comparisons for STAT4-NFKB1 only
ci_reporting: Fisher-z 95% CI where source-level n is available
interpretation_limit: Supportive downstream cytokine/pathway evidence; not direct TF nuclear activity, DNA binding, or regulon validation

p_value_type: two-sided nominal p with BH-FDR within the 3-pair family
interpretation_limit: Tests cross-platform/whole-blood context consistency; failure does not prove absence of cell-intrinsic regulation

primary_unit: TF pair or TF triplet summary within a cohort
test_family: 15 literature pairs for audit; 496 all-pair background defines PBMC null; HCTL triplet compared with 1,000 random triplets
effect_size: absolute Pearson r percentile or mean absolute pairwise r
p_value_type: empirical p=(k+1)/(N+1); BH-FDR used for tested literature-pair family when inferential claims are made
ci_reporting: percentile rank plus matched-null sensitivity in Table S4
interpretation_limit: Absolute r merges positive and negative directions; results are regulon-database, target-overlap, and tissue-context conditional

primary_unit: donor/sample-level TF score with cell-proportion covariates
test_family: tested TF-pair/covariate models within SCP548 validation cohort
effect_size: partial Pearson r after residualising TF scores
ci_reporting: partial-r CI reported in reproducibility outputs where model df is available
interpretation_limit: Uses coarse cell-type proportions only; residual subtype, batch, and ambient-RNA confounding may remain

test_family: STAT4-NFKB1 across cohort-modality summaries and leave-one-cohort-out subsets
effect_size: random-effects pooled r, tau2, I2, leave-one-out r
p_value_type: random-effects meta-analysis p and Cochran Q heterogeneity p
ci_reporting: Fisher-z 95% CI for pooled r; bootstrap CI for I2
interpretation_limit: A heterogeneity and dependence check; cross-assay synthesis is descriptive and not a common-effect biological estimate

primary_unit: donor/sample-level TF score under permuted disease labels
test_family: tested TF pairs within each validation cohort
effect_size: observed absolute r versus disease-label permutation null
interpretation_limit: Tests contribution of disease-group structure to covariation; does not test pair specificity, mechanism, or causality
